title: Observability for developers building connectors
preview: Published connectors in the "directory" now have a dashboard showing how they're performing across Claude product surfaces. Connector owners can use it to:

blocks.english: Published connectors in the "directory" now have a dashboard showing how they're performing across Claude product surfaces. Connector owners can use it to:
blocks.chinese: 已发布到"目录"中的连接器现在拥有一个仪表板，展示它们在各个 Claude 产品端上的表现。连接器所有者可以使用它来：

blocks.english: - **Monitor active users, total tool calls, and directory rank over time.**
blocks.chinese: 监控活跃用户数、工具调用总量以及目录排名随时间的变化。

blocks.english: - **See health score, error rates, and latency at a glance, with per-tool error breakdowns to pinpoint what's failing.**
blocks.chinese: 一览健康评分、错误率和延迟数据，并通过逐工具的错误分析精确定位问题所在。

blocks.english: - **Compare tool calls across Claude, Claude Code, Cowork, and more to understand where users are engaging.**
blocks.chinese: 比较 Claude、Claude Code、Cowork 等不同产品中的工具调用情况，了解用户在哪些平台上最为活跃。

blocks.english: Available today in public beta. Find it in Claude under "Directory" in "Organization settings". Requires Admin or Owner access on a Team or Enterprise plan. On Enterprise, Owners can also delegate access with a "custom role" that has the Directory management or Libraries permission.
blocks.chinese: 该功能今天以公开测试版上线。在 Claude 中，前往"组织设置"下的"目录"即可找到。需要团队版或企业版的管理员或所有者权限。在企业版中，所有者还可以通过具有目录管理或库权限的"自定义角色"来委派访问权限。

blocks.english: Connectors are built on the "Model Context Protocol (MCP)". There are over 300 third-party connectors in the "directory", used by millions of people every day. If you wish to submit your MCP server to the directory, you can now do so directly in Claude. "Learn more".
blocks.chinese: 连接器基于"模型上下文协议（MCP）"构建。目录中有超过 300 个第三方连接器，每天有数百万人在使用。如果您希望将自己的 MCP 服务器提交到目录中，现在可以直接在 Claude 中完成提交。"了解更多"。
